rewritten_requirements: The system shall wait for a customer.
The system shall add items one by one when a customer begins a purchase.
The system shall wait for payment after all items are added.
The system shall go back to waiting for the next customer after the payment is made.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system waits for a customer.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The system starts by waiting for a customer.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When a customer begins a purchase, items are added one by one.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When a customer begins a purchase, items are added one by one. The user can keep adding items until they finish.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system waits for payment after all items are added.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once all items are added, the system waits for payment.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After the payment is made, the system goes back to waiting for the next customer.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After the payment is made, the system goes back to waiting for the next customer.
